svg.text: LithePG — v1.1 backlog: EXPLAIN statement + QueryResult parse
QueryPlan — new pure, on-device helpers (bridges query → parser)
// Build the EXPLAIN wrapper from the user's own SQL (no network / creds)
QueryPlan.explainStatement(for: "SELECT 1;")
→ "EXPLAIN (FORMAT JSON) SELECT 1"
QueryPlan.explainStatement(for: "SELECT * FROM orders", analyze: true)
→ "EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS, FORMAT JSON) SELECT * FROM orders"
// Extract the plan JSON straight out of the QueryResult's first cell
let plan = try QueryPlan.parse(explainResult: result)
→ plan.root.nodeType == "Seq Scan", .totalCost == 21.00
empty / NULL-cell result → throws ParseError.emptyResult
$ swift test --filter QueryPlan
✔ wraps SQL in EXPLAIN (FORMAT JSON) and strips a trailing semicolon
✔ adds ANALYZE and BUFFERS when analyze is requested
✔ parses a plan out of the single-cell EXPLAIN QueryResult
✔ throws emptyResult when the EXPLAIN result has no plan cell
✔ Suite "QueryPlan" passed — 12 tests in 1 suite (was 8)
$ swift test (full suite)
✔ Test run with 168 tests in 24 suites passed — no regressions
Pure serializer/bridge slice · UI "Run EXPLAIN" affordance deferred to follow-up · no network, no credentials, no SQL auto-run
